nasb.text: And when you see a south wind blowing, you say, ‘It will be a hot day,’ and it turns out that way.

esv.text: And when you see the south wind blowing, you say, ‘There will be scorching heat,’ and it happens.

cnv.text: 起了南風，就說：‘天要熱了’，也果然這樣。

ccb.text: 南风一起，你们就说，‘天必燥热’，你们也说对了。

csbs.text: 南风一吹起，你们就说：‘要热起来了’，果然就如此。
